summary: Comprehensive testing of Depozio B2B SaaS for Turkish pharmacies. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully including login, register, onboarding, dashboard, catalog, inventory, orders, and placeholder pages.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Email sending in POST /api/orders/{id}/send logs to console only (returns email_sent=false, mock=true)
MOCKED: CSV upload in /stok is placeholder UI only, no backend endpoint
Placeholder routes /iskonto /raporlar /tedarikci /entegrasyon render ComingSoon page as expected
seed_data_creation: Demo workspace with 50 products, 3 suppliers, randomized prices/stock auto-seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_depozio_api.py cover auth, products, inventory, suppliers, orders, dashboard, workspace setup. Frontend uses Turkish UI with primary color #1a6b4a. JWT auth with Bearer token fallback for cross-origin. Email sending is mocked.

backend: POST /api/auth/register - creates user and returns access_token + cookie ✓
POST /api/auth/login - admin/staff login with workspace_id ✓
POST /api/auth/login - wrong password returns 401 ✓
GET /api/auth/me - works with Authorization Bearer header ✓
GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns orders_today, monthly_saving, critical_count>0, active_suppliers=3, recent_orders ✓
GET /api/products - returns ~50 seeded products with best_price, current_stock, min_threshold ✓
GET /api/products/search?q=8690123456001 - finds product with sorted prices and supplier_name ✓
GET /api/products/search?q=XYZNOMATCH - returns found=false ✓
POST /api/products - creates product and auto-creates inventory row, duplicate GTIN returns 400 ✓
GET /api/inventory - returns 50 rows with product_name, brand, gtin, category, turnover_30d ✓
GET /api/inventory?filter=critical - returns only items where current_stock<=min_threshold ✓
PATCH /api/inventory/{id} - updates stock values and creates inventory_log ✓
GET /api/inventory/critical - returns <=5 items with best_supplier_id and best_price ✓
GET /api/suppliers - returns 3 seeded suppliers ✓
POST /api/orders - creates/updates draft order, auto-generates order_no #SIP-YYMMDDxxx, computes total_amount and total_saving ✓
GET /api/orders - returns orders with supplier_name and item_count ✓
GET /api/orders/{id} - returns order with items enriched with product_name, gtin, and supplier object ✓
POST /api/orders/{id}/send - changes status from draft to sent (admin only, staff gets 403) ✓
POST /api/workspace/setup - creates workspace and returns updated token with workspace_id, calling twice returns 400 ✓
Protected routes require authentication (401 without token) ✓
frontend: /login - split screen with email/password form, demo credentials prefilled, submit logs in and navigates to /dashboard ✓
/register then /onboarding - create new user, fill workspace name, redirect to /dashboard with demo seed data ✓
Dashboard - 4 stat cards, scan bar, critical stock widget (up to 5 items with Sipariş buttons), recent orders widget ✓
Dashboard scan bar - GTIN or partial product name returns results, clicking Sipariş ver adds to draft order and shows toast ✓
Critical stock Sipariş button - creates draft, toast appears ✓
/katalog - lists 50 products in table with category filter pills, search input filters by name, Ürün ekle modal adds new product, row click opens right-side drawer with supplier price list ✓
/stok - inventory table with colored stock chips, tabs (Tüm/Kritik/Son 7 gün), Düzenle opens drawer, saving updates successfully ✓
/siparis - lists orders with tabs (Tümü/Bekleyen/Bu ay), row click opens drawer with items, 'Tedarikçiye gönder' opens confirm dialog, confirm changes status to 'Gönderildi' ✓
Logout button - clears session and redirects to /login ✓
Protected routes - redirect unauthenticated users to /login ✓
New user without workspace - redirected from /dashboard to /onboarding ✓
